title: DETECTION AND CHARACTERIZATION OF FUSOBACTERIUM NECROPHORUM LktA GENE FROM FOOTROT OF SHEEP AND GOATS IN ANDHRA PRADESH
author: Yeturi, sreeharsha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Developded the PCR diagnostic protocol to diagnose and identify  F.nechrophorum  and  D.nodosus  from field samples of footrot in sheep and goats, which will help in designing strategies and footrot mitigation protocols, on contemplating various factors the  lktA gene  of  F.nechophorum  is chosen for characterization as a leading cause of footrot in sheep and goats.
steps_raw: Developded the PCR diagnostic protocol to diagnose and identify  F.nechrophorum  and  D.nodosus  from field samples of footrot in sheep and goats, which will help in designing strategies and footrot mitigation protocols, on contemplating various factors the  lktA gene  of  F.nechophorum  is chosen for characterization as a leading cause of footrot in sheep and goats.
